channel.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Editor Plugins

  • proto-repl (Atom)

    • Advanced datastructures

  • specterstars2.2k: an elegant API for querying and transforming nested and recursive data

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
HTTP

  • clj-httpstars1.6k : Apache HttpComponents client wrapper
  • http-kitstars2.2k : Simple, high-performance event-driven HTTP client and server
  • ringstars3.3k : HTTP server abstraction
  • kvltstars70 : Uniform, asychronous client interface for HTTP across JVM / Node / browsers
  • alephstars2.3k : Async client/server based on Netty, with defaults for HTTP, TCP and UDP

    • Dependency injection

  • clipstars137

    • Date and Time

  • tickstars429: Clojure(Script) library, intended as replacement for clj-time

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Video tutorials

YouTube

  • Clojure Tutorials by Timothy Baldridge: More advanced videos on core.async, transducers, transients, logic programming and a "Function of the day" series.

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Advanced datastructures

  • bifurcanstars874: linear map/set/list (stores entries contiguously in memory), ;writtern in java, but test suite (read: usage examples) in clojure
  • Persistent AVL treesstars117: persistent sorted maps and sets with log-time rank queries
  • Finger Treestars200: double-list, counted-double-list, counted-sorted-set
  • Hitchhiker Treestars1.1k: create fast, snapshottable, massively scalable databases
  • Hierarchical setstars5
  • Orderedstars201: ordered sets and maps
  • Lazy Mapstars45: whose values are only calculated when accessed
  • Duratomstars151, endurostars106, perdurestars15: atoms persisted on disk
  • Durable Queuestars352: queue persisted on disk

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Monads

  • Fluokittenstars412

    • Science and Data Analysis

  • Bayadera - Bayesian Data Analysis on the GPUstars342
  • ClojureCUDAstars160
  • Neanderthal - fast matrix and linear algebrastars933
  • ClojureCL - parallel computations with OpenCLstars268

    • Web Framework

  • Compojure-apistars1.1k
  • Reititstars925

    • JSON

  • jsonistastars296

    • RESTful API

  • Compojure-apistars1.1k
  • reititstars925

    • Async processing

  • manifoldstars852

    • WebSocket

  • alephstars2.3k

    • Editor Plugins

  • Calva (VSCode)stars865

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • dl4clj (deeplearning4j to clojure)stars98
  • clojure-tensorflowstars108

    • Video tutorials

    YouTube

  • Misophistful's channel: Understand concepts such as list comprehension, threading macros, generative testing, destructuring, core.match and introductions to Light Table, Datomic and Game development with Clojure
  • Fred Overflow's channel: Introductions to Functional programming and TDD with Clojure
  • Clojure Pills screencast: Introduction to Clojure one function at a time
  • Data persistance with Postgres, Clojure and JDBC
